rights_holder: Lewis Carroll (Charles Lutwidge Dodgson, 1832–1898). Public domain.
attribution: Lewis Carroll, "Alice Liddell as 'The Queen of May'", 1859. Public domain (PD-old).
subject: Lewis Carroll's photograph of Alice Liddell. The image appears in the Wikimedia Commons category "The Family of Man (Steichen exhibition)" — implying inclusion in the 1955 exhibition — but the file description itself does not directly attest FoM membership, and Carroll is not yet seeded in our data/photographers.csv. The plate is presumably in the still-uncatalogued portion of the 503-plate Master Checklist (plates #252–#503 or among the gaps in #1–#251). FoM-membership flag: PROBABLE BUT UNVERIFIED — needs cross-check against Sandeen 1995 or the full Master Checklist plate list before captioning as a confirmed FoM plate.
